one_liner: Helix AI is the AI-native operating system for the AI-native enterprise.
use_of_funds_summary: Hire AI talent and scale AI infrastructure for AI-native customers.
transcript_text: Helix AI is the AI-native operating system for the AI-native enterprise. We are building AI-native infrastructure for AI-native workflows. Our AI-native platform powers AI-native customers across AI-native verticals. We are the AI-native leader in the AI-native category. Our AI-native team is uniquely positioned to win the AI-native market. The AI-native opportunity is enormous. AI-native enterprises need AI-native tooling. We provide the AI-native tooling that AI-native enterprises need. Our AI-native moat is our AI-native data. Our AI-native data powers our AI-native models. Our AI-native models power our AI-native product. Our AI-native product powers our AI-native customers. We are raising to hire AI talent and scale AI infrastructure for AI-native customers. We are the AI-native team for the AI-native moment.
